seoTitle: Rawdon Vale vs Raworth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rawdon Vale and Raworth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rawdon Vale vs Raworth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rawdon Vale and Raworth.
heading: Rawdon Vale vs Raworth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rawdon Vale, New South Wales and Raworth, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rawdon Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Raworth (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rawdon Vale or Raworth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rawdon Vale has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Raworth scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rawdon Vale scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Raworth scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rawdon Vale or Raworth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rawdon Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
